name: FileUpload
description: File upload component with drag and drop support. Compound component with drop zone and file items.

children.description: Drop zone and uploaded file items

FileUploadDropZone.name: FileUploadDropZone
FileUploadDropZone.description: Drag and drop zone for file upload

onDrop.description: Handler when files are dropped: (files: File[]) => void

file.description: File data: { name: string, size: number, type: string }

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Drop zone announces accepted file types. File items announce name and status.

examples.title: With Uploaded Files
examples.code:
<FileUpload>
  <FileUploadDropZone onDrop={handleDrop} accept=".pdf,.doc,.docx" multiple />
  {files.map(file => (
    <FileUploadItem
      key={file.name}
      file={file}
      status="complete"
      onRemove={() => removeFile(file)}
    />
  ))}
</FileUpload>

examples.title: With Upload Progress
examples.code:
<FileUpload>
  <FileUploadDropZone onDrop={handleDrop} />
  {uploading.map(file => (
    <FileUploadItem
      key={file.name}
      file={file}
      status="uploading"
      progress={file.progress}
    />
  ))}
  {completed.map(file => (
    <FileUploadItem
      key={file.name}
      file={file}
      status="complete"
      onRemove={() => removeFile(file)}
    />
  ))}
</FileUpload>

examples.title: With Error State
examples.code:
<FileUpload>
  <FileUploadDropZone onDrop={handleDrop} />
  <FileUploadItem
    file={{ name: 'document.pdf', size: 15000000, type: 'application/pdf' }}
    status="error"
    error="File size exceeds limit"
    onRemove={handleRemove}
  />
</FileUpload>
